team_employees_count: {count, plural, one {# AI Employee} other {# AI Employees}}

team_subtitle: Your agents and you, in one shared channel.
team_empty_state: No accounts yet. Add one under Settings → Accounts and its agent will join this channel.

team_input_disabled: Add an account to start the channel.
team_badge_aria: {count, plural, one {# question awaiting your decision} other {# questions awaiting your decision}}
